# Quality control {#sec-qc}

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
})
options(warn = 2)
targets::tar_source()
targets::tar_load(qc_figures)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
theme_set(theme_tau())
qc <- qc_figures

fmt_n <- function(x) {
  vapply(x, function(v) {
    if (is.infinite(v)) return("Inf")
    if (abs(v - round(v)) < 1e-9) {
      return(format(as.integer(round(v)), big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE))
    }
    format(round(v, 3), nsmall = 3, big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE)
  }, FUN.VALUE = character(1))
}
fmt_range <- function(lo, hi) paste0(fmt_n(lo), "-", fmt_n(hi))
wrap_lab <- function(x, width = 18L) {
  vapply(strwrap(x, width = width, simplify = FALSE), paste, collapse = "\n", FUN.VALUE = character(1))
}
metric_lab <- function(x) {
  c(nCount_RNA = "UMIs", nFeature_RNA = "detected genes", percent_mt = "mitochondrial %",
    percent_ribo = "ribosomal %", percent_malat1 = "MALAT1 %",
    percent_contam = "contamination %")[x]
}
genotype_labels <- c(MAPTKI = "MAPTKI", P301S = "P301S",
                     NLGF_MAPTKI = "NLGF + MAPTKI",
                     NLGF_P301S = "NLGF + P301S")
sample_key_row <- qc$modality_table$modality == "proteomics sample key"
metric_names <- metric_lab(qc$metric_bounds$metric)
stopifnot(
  is.list(qc),
  all(c("modality_table", "geomx_genotype", "genotype_batch", "depth_distribution",
        "fraction_distribution", "metric_bounds", "audit_notes", "study_design") %in% names(qc)),
  all(c("genotype_grid", "sample_counts") %in% names(qc$study_design)),
  nrow(qc$modality_table) == 5L,
  nrow(qc$study_design$genotype_grid) == 4L,
  nrow(qc$study_design$sample_counts) == 12L,
  sum(sample_key_row) == 1L,
  !anyNA(metric_names),
  nrow(qc$geomx_genotype) == 4L,
  nrow(qc$genotype_batch) == 16L,
  length(unique(qc$genotype_batch$batch)) == 4L,
  all(qc$genotype_batch$Freq > 0),
  sum(qc$geomx_genotype$n_aoi) == 91L,
  qc$modality_table$n_samples[sample_key_row] == 16L,
  all(qc$metric_bounds$within),
  all(qc$metric_bounds$n_na == 0L)
)
```

## Study design

```{r}
#| label: fig-qc-study-design
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 4.8
#| fig-cap: "The 2x2 genotype design has support across single-nucleus, spatial and bulk layers."
#| fig-alt: "Panel A marks the tau by amyloid genotype grid as labelled tiles; panel B shows per-genotype sample counts as direct-labelled point stems across modalities."
design_grid <- qc$study_design$genotype_grid
design_grid$genotype <- factor(as.character(design_grid$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
design_counts <- qc$study_design$sample_counts
design_counts$genotype <- factor(as.character(design_counts$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
design_counts$modality <- factor(as.character(design_counts$modality),
                                 levels = c("snRNAseq nuclei", "GeoMx AOIs", "24M bulk runs"))
design_counts$label <- fmt_n(design_counts$n)
count_pad <- stats::aggregate(n ~ modality, data = design_counts, FUN = max)
names(count_pad)[2L] <- "max_n"
design_counts <- merge(design_counts, count_pad, by = "modality", all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)
design_counts$label_y <- design_counts$n + pmax(design_counts$max_n * 0.035, 0.8)

p_grid <- ggplot(design_grid, aes(tau_background, amyloid)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = genotype), colour = "#F8F6F1", linewidth = 0.8,
            width = 0.92, height = 0.92) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3.05, fontface = "bold", lineheight = 0.9,
            colour = "#F8F6F1") +
  scale_fill_genotype(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "tau background", y = "amyloid", title = "Factorial genotype design") +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1.05) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"))

p_counts <- ggplot(design_counts, aes(genotype, n, fill = genotype)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = genotype, y = 0, yend = n),
               colour = "#B7B1A5", linewidth = 0.55) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 3.2, stroke = 0.35, colour = "#262B2F") +
  geom_text(aes(y = label_y, label = label), size = 2.7, colour = "#333333") +
  facet_wrap(~ modality, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_genotype(guide = "none") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = genotype_labels) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "count", title = "Per-genotype support by layer") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())

(p_grid | p_counts) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(0.9, 2.1)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")
```

## snRNAseq microglia: quality metrics

```{r}
#| label: fig-qc-depth
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 4.8
#| fig-cap: "Total counts and detected genes stay finite across genotypes."
#| fig-alt: "Area and line traces show log10 total-count and detected-gene distributions by genotype."
depth_bins <- qc$depth_distribution
depth_bins$genotype <- factor(as.character(depth_bins$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
depth_bins$metric <- factor(depth_bins$metric, levels = c("total counts", "detected genes"))
depth_width <- median(diff(sort(unique(depth_bins$x_mid))))
ggplot(depth_bins, aes(x_mid, n, fill = genotype, colour = genotype)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.28, linewidth = 0) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.45) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ genotype, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_genotype(guide = "none") +
  scale_colour_genotype(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "log10 count", y = "nuclei", title = "Library size and complexity")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-qc-fractions
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-cap: "Mitochondrial, ribosomal, MALAT1 and contamination fractions remain bounded."
#| fig-alt: "Area and line traces show percentage-quality distributions by genotype."
frac_bins <- qc$fraction_distribution
frac_bins$genotype <- factor(as.character(frac_bins$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
frac_bins$metric <- factor(frac_bins$metric, levels = c("mitochondrial %", "ribosomal %",
                                                        "MALAT1 %", "contamination %"))
frac_width <- median(diff(sort(unique(frac_bins$x_mid))))
ggplot(frac_bins, aes(x_mid, n, fill = genotype, colour = genotype)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.28, linewidth = 0) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.45) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ genotype, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_genotype(guide = "none") +
  scale_colour_genotype(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "% of nucleus counts", y = "nuclei", title = "Quality fractions")
```
